task:
OBJECTIVE: Rewrite /Users/srini/Projects/kommit/app/page.tsx

Complete UI overhaul. Keep all existing logic exactly as is. Only change the visual presentation.

DESIGN RULES:
- Single font: Inter (already loaded in layout.tsx)
- Single font size: 14px everywhere. No exceptions. No headings with different sizes.
- Font weight: 300 for headings, 400 for body, 500 for labels/buttons
- Background: #ffffff
- Text primary: #1a1a1a
- Text muted: #8a8a8a
- Border: 1px solid #e4e4e4
- Gold accent: #C4922A
- No Tailwind. Inline styles only.

LAYOUT:
1. Nav bar: logo left (gray #545454 box with gold K + OMMIT text), Dashboard + Login links right. Border bottom 1px #f0f0f0.
2. Page center: heading "What's weighing on you right now?" font-weight 300, letter-spacing -0.8px. Subtitle "Speak or type. 10 agents. Zero judgment." color #8a8a8a.
3. Fingerprint speak button: centered, 100px circle, gold border, breathing animation, pulse ring. Use /logo-icon.png as the image inside (width 60px height 60px border-radius 50%).
4. OR divider: thin 1px lines with "or" centered.
5. Input box: border 1px #e4e4e4, border-radius 10px, padding 4px 4px 4px 18px, flex row. Text input flex:1, no border, 14px. Gold send button (#C4922A) 38px circle on right with arrow-up icon.
6. Privacy note: "Private. Deleted after analysis." centered below, color #b0aaa0.

ANIMATIONS:
@keyframes breathe: scale 1 to 1.05, 3s infinite
@keyframes ring: opacity 0.25 to 0, scale 1 to 1.55, 2.5s infinite

FILES: /Users/srini/Projects/kommit/app/page.tsx

ACCEPTANCE CRITERIA:
All font sizes are 14px
Logo uses /logo-icon.png inside the speak button
Nav has Dashboard and Login
Inline styles only
No TypeScript errors

TEST: cd /Users/srini/Projects/kommit; npx tsc --noEmit

DO NOT: break voice recording, submit, SSE streaming, card display, agent feed logic
DO NOT: use ast.parse
